User.title: User
User.description: Stores individual student profiles, dashboard streaks, stats, and exam preferences.

uid.description: Unique identifier of the student, matching request.auth.uid

createdAt.description: When the user account was created

updatedAt.description: When the user profile was last updated

examType.description: The current exam the student is preparing for

targetScore.description: The student's target score or grade goal

questionsPracticed.description: Total number of practice questions completed

users/{userId}.description: Student profiles indexed by their Firebase Auth User ID
